name: Pasta Salad Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray large skillet with vegetable cooking spray according to directions.
2. Saute garlic.
3. Add broccoli, red pepper, carrot, tomato, and basil; stir to heat through.
4. Add sauteed vegetables to cooked macaroni and toss well.
5. Pour olive oil and vinegar over the mixture.
6. Season with salt and pepper; toss well.
7. Serve warm or cold.
Nutrition Analysis per serving: 328 cal; 9gm pro; 49gm carb; 11gm fat; 22 mg sod; 0mg chol.
